meta.title: Detecting Counterfeit Smart Grid Devices
meta.description:
Selcuk Uluagac of FIU discussed a US Dept of Energy supported project on detecting counterfeit devices on a Smart Grid.

Counterfeit devices can cause Information Leakage, Measurement Poisoning, Store and Send Later and other impacts.
